hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Your Trusted Partner in Finding the Perfect Boarding House
hero.description: We are committed to providing comfortable, safe, and affordable boarding house solutions for students and professionals in Medan.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Why We Do What We Do
mission.description: To create a comfortable and supportive living environment that enables residents to focus on their studies and careers without worrying about accommodation quality.
mission.visionDescription: To become the most trusted and preferred boarding house provider in Medan, known for quality, service, and resident satisfaction.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: We never compromise on the quality of our facilities and services.

trust.title: Trustworthy
trust.description: Building trust through transparency and consistent service excellence.

community.title: Community
community.description: Creating a warm and supportive community for all residents.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Continuously improving our facilities and services with modern solutions.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Perfect Home?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of satisfied residents who have found their ideal living space with us.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you

hero.title: Terms & Conditions
hero.subtitle: Our Policies and Your Rights
hero.description: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using our services

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: These Terms and Conditions (hereinafter referred to as 'Terms') govern your use of the Cherry Sky Kost platform, website, and services. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to any part of these Terms, please do not use our services.

userResponsibilities.title: 2. User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.content: As a user of our platform, you are responsible for:
items: Providing accurate and complete information during registration
Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
Not engaging in any illegal or unauthorized activities
Complying with all applicable laws and regulations
Respecting the rights and property of other users

bookingPolicy.title: 3. Booking and Reservation Policy
bookingPolicy.content: All bookings and reservations are subject to availability and confirmation. We reserve the right to reject any booking request. Cancellations must be made in accordance with our cancellation policy. Any deposits or payments made are subject to the terms outlined in your booking confirmation.

paymentTerms.title: 4. Payment Terms
paymentTerms.content: Payment for boarding house accommodation must be made in advance as specified in the booking confirmation. We accept various payment methods including bank transfer and online payment platforms. All prices are in Indonesian Rupiah (IDR) unless otherwise stated.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Cherry Sky Kost shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of our platform or services. This includes loss of data, business interruption, or any other damage.

privacy.title: 6. Privacy and Data Protection
privacy.content: Your privacy is important to us. We collect and process personal data in accordance with applicable privacy laws. Information you provide will be used only for the purposes outlined in our Privacy Policy. We take appropriate measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access.

intellectualProperty.title: 7. Intellectual Property Rights
intellectualProperty.content: All content, images, text, logos, and other materials on our platform are protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or transmit any content without our prior written permission.

modifications.title: 8. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the website. Your continued use of our services following any modifications constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.

termination.title: 9. Termination of Service
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account and service access at any time for violating these Terms or engaging in prohibited activities. Upon termination, your right to use our services will immediately cease.

disclaimer.title: 10. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Our services are provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. We do not warrant that our platform will be error-free or uninterrupted. We are not responsible for any third-party services or external links.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:
items: Email: legal@cherryskykost.com
Address: Jl. Gaharu Gg. Amat Lama No. 12, Medan

terms.agree: I Agree to the Terms and Conditions

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your Privacy Matters to Us
hero.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Cherry Sky Kost (hereinafter referred to as 'Company', 'we', 'us', or 'our') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when using our website and platform.

informationCollection.title: 2. Information We Collect
informationCollection.content: We collect information in various ways, including:
items: Personal identification information (name, email, phone number, address)
Account registration and profile information
Payment information (processed securely through third-party providers)
Booking and reservation details
Communication preferences and inquiries
Device information and usage data (IP address, browser type, pages visited)
Cookies and similar tracking technologies

useOfInformation.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
useOfInformation.content: We use collected information for various purposes:
items: Providing and maintaining our services
Processing bookings and transactions
Sending transactional and promotional communications
Responding to your inquiries and customer service requests
Improving our website and user experience
Detecting and preventing fraudulent activities
Complying with legal obligations
Analytics and business intelligence

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes encryption, secure servers, and limited employee access. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

dataRetention.title: 5. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including to fulfill legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. You can request deletion of your data subject to certain legal obligations.

userRights.title: 6. Your Rights and Choices
userRights.content: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
items: Right to access your personal information
Right to correct or update inaccurate data
Right to request deletion of your information
Right to opt-out of marketing communications
Right to withdraw consent at any time
Right to data portability
Right to lodge complaints with supervisory authorities

thirdPartyServices.title: 7. Third-Party Services and Links
thirdPartyServices.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites and services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We recommend reviewing their privacy policies before providing any personal information.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience. These tools collect information about browsing behavior, preferences, and usage patterns. You can control cookie settings through your browser, though some features may not function properly if cookies are disabled.

childrenPrivacy.title: 9. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: Our services are not directed to children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware of such collection, we will take steps to delete the information and terminate the child's account.

internationaltransfer.title: 10. International Data Transfers
internationaltransfer.content: Your information may be transferred to, stored in, and processed in countries other than your country of residence. These countries may have data protection laws that differ from your home country. By using our services, you consent to such transfers.

policyUpdates.title: 11. Updates to Privacy Policy
policyUpdates.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or applicable laws. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated policy on our website with an updated 'Last Updated' date.

contact.title: 12. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:
items: Email: privacy@cherryskykost.com
Address: Jl. Gaharu Gg. Amat Lama No. 12, Medan
